{{Quote|Ages ago in the garbage pits of Coruscant, illegal racers figured out how to make personal flyers out of scavenged airfoils and low-power repulsorlifts.|Chentu Chek|<ref name="BHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>}}
'''Racing wings''' were designed by the impoverished fringe living in [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant's undercity]], where homemade parawings were used [[Pit racing|to soar]] through the tractor field boosters and rocketing garbage canisters of the [[Coruscant Waste Management Authority]]. An optical cup fed avionics data directly into the pilot's eye, and small wingtip-mounted maneuvering jets helped steer the contraption into the tractor fields that provided it with lift and power. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was involved in a race with racing wings in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. They were later used as the basis for the design of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Parawings/Legends|parawings]].
